texto: A “good friend” was well…. Like your teeth.You had a limited number of them to last you an entire lifetime.You could survive without them, but having them made life much more enjoyable.If you didn’t take good care of them, you could lose them forever.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rob Wood: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “A “good friend” was well…. Like your teeth.You had a limited number of them to last you an entire…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous-quotes, could pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
